contract.title: Foundation Health
contract.summary: Shared starter rules for status review across services, stores, and foundational dependencies.

statuses.label: Attention
statuses.description: One or more checks need review

contract.content_frame: Use summary counts first, then drill into service and dependency tables.
contract.data_view: Show status, scope, and direct evidence close together.
contract.form_action: Prefer investigate and acknowledge actions over inline edits.

reference_set.title: Health References
reference_set.summary: Pattern hints for service and dependency status pages.

contract.title: Global Preferences
contract.summary: Shared starter rules for global defaults, display settings, and review-before-save controls.
contract.content_frame: Group defaults into sections with clear preview and change-review hints.
contract.data_view: Use small preview panels near the form instead of separating context too far.
contract.form_action: Keep save actions explicit and role-aware.

reference_set.title: Preference References
reference_set.summary: Pattern hints for defaults and shared settings.

contract.title: User Directory
contract.summary: Shared starter rules for account lists, role assignment, and admin-only actions.

statuses.label: Review
statuses.description: Permissions or status should be checked

contract.content_frame: Keep summary counts and table actions visible together for fast administration.
contract.data_view: Favor clear columns for identity, contact, roles, and status.
contract.form_action: Restrict create and edit actions behind explicit admin paths.

reference_set.title: User References
reference_set.summary: Pattern hints for account administration surfaces.

links.label: Directory
links.summary: User list with status and role context.

links.label: Actions
links.summary: Create, edit, disable, and audit entry points.

contract.title: Event Audit
contract.summary: Shared starter rules for event logs, filters, and read-mostly audit surfaces.
contract.content_frame: Keep filters near the table and make context columns easy to scan.
contract.data_view: Show timestamp, category, source, and notes without hiding audit anchors.
contract.form_action: Prefer read-first workflows with explicit edit and delete gates.

reference_set.title: Audit References
reference_set.summary: Pattern hints for log browsing and event review.

links.label: Filter panel
links.summary: Fast narrowing by source or collection.
